projectDescription: A decentralized, end-to-end encrypted file and message sharing platform built on the Base blockchain, using IPFS storage and SIWE authentication for trustless, wallet-native secure content delivery.
keyFeatures: AES-GCM 256 client-side encryption via Web Crypto API
On-chain access policies via Solidity smart contract on Base
Free and Pro tiers with per-wallet rate limiting
publicApiSurface: POST /api/storeMetadata — Store encrypted content metadata and create a secure link
POST /api/verify-siwe — Verify a SIWE signature and validate on-chain policy
GET /api/getPolicy/[policyId] — Retrieve policy details by ID
GET /api/getEncryptedContent/[cid] — Fetch encrypted content from IPFS
GET /api/access-logs — Retrieve access logs for authenticated user
POST /api/upgrade/verify-payment — Verify USDC payment for Pro upgrade
Shield.createPolicy(policyId, recipient, expiry, maxAttempts) — Create on-chain access policy
Shield.logAttempt(policyId, success) — Log an on-chain access attempt
Shield.isPolicyValid(policyId) — Check if a policy is still valid
